title: Stepstone Jobs Scraper ($0.30/1k results)
description: Search Stepstone job listings across Germany, Austria, Netherlands, and Belgium.

query.title: Job Search Query
query.description: Search keywords, for example software engineer, nurse, data analyst, or sales manager. Empty input defaults to a Berlin software example query.

location.title: Location
location.description: City, region, or remote location, for example Berlin, Munich, Vienna, Amsterdam, Brussels, or remote.

radius.title: Search Radius
radius.description: Search radius from the provided location. Scrappa accepts 0 to 200.

work_from_home.title: Work From Home
work_from_home.description: Only return listings marked as work-from-home or home-office friendly.

date_posted.title: Date Posted
date_posted.description: Only return jobs posted in the selected number of days. Common values are 1, 3, 7, or 30.

page.title: Page
page.description: Stepstone result page to fetch. Use data.pagination.next_page from a previous run to continue.

limit.title: Results Per Page
limit.description: Number of jobs to return in one request. Scrappa accepts 1 to 100.
